summary: Memory Analyzer runs by default with actionable optimization insights, periodic Apple Intelligence analysis, and notification actions.
introduced: Action buttons on Optimization Analysis — perform Free Memory, Quit, Restart, or Focus App directly from AI insights
Periodic Apple Intelligence re-analysis every 5 minutes based on current memory usage and computing habits
Memory Analyzer enabled by default — background sampling starts when DiskWise launches
Insight notifications — alerts when Apple Intelligence finds a new recommendation, with a one-tap Perform Action button
Notification permission prompt on first launch when memory notifications are enabled
changed: Apple Intelligence memory prompts now include a Better computing habits section with practical Mac usage tips
Suggested Actions and Optimization Analysis share the same actionable recommendation rows
